title: Dagger (disambiguation)
content:
'''Dagger''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Dagger]]s''', a type of [[melee weapon]]
**'''[[Vibrodagger]]s'''
*'''[[Department of Artifacts and Archival Goods Retrieval]]''', a [[New Republic]] organization known as '''Dagger'''
*The '''[[Dagger of Mortis]]''', a mystical blade from [[Mortis]] capable of killing [[Force wielder]]s
*'''[[Mount Dagger]]''', a shield [[volcano]] on [[Dagobah]]
*The '''[[TIE/dg starfighter]]''', known as the '''TIE Dagger'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Weapons===
====Melee====
*'''[[Dagger/Legends|Daggers]]''', a type of [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapon]]
**'''[[Adumari dagger]]s'''
**'''[[Datadagger]]s''', a concealed [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrilan]] variant
**'''[[Punch-dagger]]s'''
**'''[[Vibrodagger/Legends|Vibrodaggers]]'''
*The '''[[Dagger of Mortis/Legends|Dagger of Mortis]]''', a mystical blade from [[Mortis/Legends|Mortis]] capable of killing [[Celestial/Legends|Force wielders]]
*'''[[Dagger thorn]]s'''
*The '''[[Loag Dagger]]''', a ceremonial symbol of the [[Loag]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]]

====Other====
*The '''[["Dagger" Combat Pistol]]''', a [[Coruschal WeaponWorks]] [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]]

===Droids===
*'''[[DM/C3]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] who operated under the codename "'''Dagger'''"
*The '''[[K7 "Black Dagger" Security Droid]]''', a [[Rim Securities/Legends|Rim Securities]] [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] model

===Locations===
*'''[[The Dagger (Onderon)|The Dagger]]''', a rock spire on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]
*'''[[Mount Yoda]]''', a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] formerly known as '''Mount Dagger'''

===Starships===
====Classes====
*The '''[[Dagger-class starfighter|''Dagger''-class starfighter]]'''
*The '''[[Dagger-D police fighter]]'''

====Individual ships====
*'''''[[Dagger (Assassin-class)|Dagger]]''''', a group of two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]]
*'''''[[Dagger (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|Dagger]]''''', a Rebel Alliance [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]
*'''''[[Dagger (Galactic Republic)|Dagger]]''''', a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] in the service of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*'''''[[Daggerblade]]''''', an Imperial [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]]
*'''''[[Happy Dagger]]''''', a [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] owned by [[Roa]]

===Other===
*'''[[The Dagger]]''', a pirate tactic developed by [[Mercevian Nagua]] to tug [[Starship/Legends|starships]] out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]
*'''[[Daggerlip]]s''', predators from [[Cona/Legends|Cona]]
*The '''[[Hidden Daggers]]''', a pirate gang operating in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]

{{Disambig}}

__NOTOC__
